evidence_spans.span: The score function is the derivative of the log-likelihood with respect to the parameter, s(θ) = ∇_θ ℓ(θ). At an interior differentiable optimum, an MLE candidate satisfies the score equation s(θ)=0.

results.rationale: The score equation s(θ)=0 is derived from the log-likelihood function ℓ(θ) via its derivative, and it formalizes the condition for a maximum likelihood estimate.
